• Installation
  • Quick Start
  • Advanced Usage

Installation

Install the HTTP client library using pip:

pip install httpx

Quick Start

Making a request is simple:

import httpx

response = httpx.get('https://api.example.com/data')
print(response.json())

Advanced Usage

For production use, create a client instance:

async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
    response = await client.get('https://api.example.com')
